pokemon:stakataka.name: Stakataka
pokemon:stakataka.summary: When stone walls started moving and attacking, the brute’s true identity was this mysterious life-form, which brings to mind an Ultra Beast.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: When stone walls started moving and attacking, the brute’s true identity was this mysterious life-form, which brings to mind an Ultra Beast.
It appeared from an Ultra Wormhole. Each one appears to be made up of many life-forms stacked one on top of each other.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: When stone walls started moving and attacking, the brute’s true identity was this mysterious life-form, which brings to mind an Ultra Beast.

form:stakataka.summary: Stakataka form with Rock / Steel typing.
